title: atomic-skills common primitives (schemaVersion 0.1)
description: Shared types referenced by plan.schema.json and initiative.schema.json. Mirrors aideck/src/schemas/common.ts and the shared subset of aideck/src/schemas/project-status.ts.

schemaVersion.description: Frozen at 0.1 for atomic-skills v2.0.0. Future bumps require a migration path.

isoTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp with explicit Z or ±HH:MM offset.

slug.description: kebab-case identifier. Lowercase, starts with letter, 2-64 chars.

provenance.description: Records when and how an item (task or phase) was added AFTER the initial materialization of its container. Absent on items that shipped in the original plan/initiative; present on items added mid-execution via the agent-proposes / user-invokes flow described in skills/en/core/project-status.md.

surfacedDuring.description: Either `<initiative-slug>/<task-id>` (most common: emerged while working on a specific task) or `<initiative-slug>` (emerged during initiative-level work) or a short free-form note when no anchor is appropriate.

surfacedBy.description: Who surfaced the item — human in conversation, or AI that noticed it while working.

originalPhaseId.description: For tasks moved cross-phase via reanchor: the phase the task originally belonged to.

evidence.description: Captured result of running the criterion's verifier. Written by the project-status skill's phase-done workflow. Read by aiDeck (when present) to render gate evidence.

passed.description: True iff the verifier produced the expected result. Stored even when status='met' to disambiguate user-overrides from verified passes.

exitCode.description: Shell verifier: actual exit code observed.

rowCount.description: Query verifier: row count observed (stubbed in v0.1; written when caller has run the query externally).

outputSummary.description: Brief excerpt of verifier output (truncated to ~500 chars). For manual verifier, the user's confirmation note.
